raw_consumer_statement:
There was an {$80.00} charge against my CitiBank credit card, account number ending in XXXX, on XX/XX/year> that I did not recognize. I filed a dispute of this charge with CitiBank promptly. CitiBank did request proof of the transaction from the merchant, XXXX XXXX. The merchant provided a Chargeback Evidence form showing the customer name of XXXX XXXX. I am not XXXX XXXX. Please see attached. 

In spite of these facts, CitiBank has ultimately found me responsible for the charge. 

I have made multiple attempts ( by email, website chat, phone, and postal mail ) over the last few months to resolve this issue to no avail. The {$80.00} plus interest was paid by me on XX/XX/year> so my credit rating isn't dinged. 

I contend, that I do not recognize the {$80.00} charge, nor the merchant or customer name listed on the merchant 's chargeback evidence.
